name: Apple-Walnut Slaw
recipeIngredient: 2 Gala Or Golden Or Red Delicious Apples, Quartered, Cored And Cut In Thin Wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except the apples in a large bowl.
2. Gently fold in the apples, taking care not to break them.
3. Serve and enjoy your Apple-Walnut Slaw.
